compiled_state.title: RED: Add Figma collaboration eval test case for design-wireframe
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` that asserts design-wireframe handles `design.figma_collaboration=true` correctly.

The test case should verify that when a story has Figma collaboration enabled:
- The skill references Figma-optimized SVG requirements (semantic <g> names matching spatial-layout.json IDs)
- The skill mentions inline styles and SVG 1.1 structure
- The skill includes tagging with design:awaiting_import
- The skill references directory creation for designs/{uuid}/

This test case MUST FAIL (RED) against the current SKILL.md, which has no Figma-specific logic. The implementation task (T4) will make it pass (GREEN).

### Files to modify
- Modify: `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`

## TDD Requirement

Run `.claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md` — the new Figma test case must FAIL. This is the RED state.

Test approach: The eval test sends a prompt scenario where design.figma_collaboration=true and uses llm-rubric to verify the skill output includes Figma-specific SVG instructions. It fails because SKILL.md currently has no Figma mode.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains a Figma collaboration test case
  Verify: grep -q 'figma' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] The Figma test case fails (RED) against current SKILL.md
  Verify: echo "RED state — test expected to fail before SKILL.md modification"

comments.body: Fixed: Batch 2 complete — code committed and pushed.
comments.author: Test
